content.title: <TextStyle.Yellow>Welcome to Ky's Modded Ark Cluster!</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>A casual, boosted PvE server running </><TextStyle.Orange>Ark Supreme</><TextStyle.White> on </><TextStyle.Green>Astraeos</><TextStyle.White>!</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>What We Offer:</>
<TextStyle.White>- Ark Supreme creature overhaul with tiered dinos and bosses
- 10x Harvest, 20x Taming, 25x XP
- 39 QoL mods for the best experience
- Max level 200 with 150 post-tame dino levels
- Starter kit with metal tools and a Level 150 Ptera
- Friendly, helpful community</>

<TextStyle.Yellow>Quick Connect:</>
<TextStyle.White>IP: 216.144.241.3:7707
Map: Astraeos | Mode: PvE</>

<TextStyle.Green>Press the tabs above to see rules, rates, and mods.
Click Discord below to join our community!</>

content.title: <TextStyle.Red>Server Rules</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>1. Be respectful - no racism, sexism, or hate speech
2. No cheating, exploiting, or meshing
3. No real-money trading (RMT)
4. Report issues via Discord tickets
5. Staff decisions are final</>

<TextStyle.Yellow>Building Rules:</>
<TextStyle.White>- One main base per tribe
- Remove taming traps when done
- Don't block resources, artifacts, or obelisks
- Don't block pathways or community areas
- Keep builds performance-friendly</>

content.title: <TextStyle.Yellow>PvE Community Guidelines</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>This is a PvE server - no griefing!

- Don't leave tames on wander outside your base
- Don't kite wild dinos into other players
- Clean up unwanted tames
- Help new players when possible
- Trading must be consensual
- Report inactive bases after 2 weeks</>

<TextStyle.Red>Breaking rules may result in warnings, timeouts, or bans.</>

content.title: <TextStyle.Green>Server Rates</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Yellow>XP:</> <TextStyle.White>25x</>
<TextStyle.Yellow>Harvesting:</> <TextStyle.White>10x</>
<TextStyle.Yellow>Harvest Health:</> <TextStyle.White>2.5x</>
<TextStyle.Yellow>Taming Speed:</> <TextStyle.White>20x</>
<TextStyle.Yellow>Mating Interval:</> <TextStyle.White>0.2x (5x faster)</>
<TextStyle.Yellow>Egg Hatch:</> <TextStyle.White>0.2x (5x faster)</>
<TextStyle.Yellow>Crop Growth:</> <TextStyle.White>10x</>

<TextStyle.Yellow>Max Wild Dino:</> <TextStyle.White>150</>
<TextStyle.Yellow>Dino Distribution:</> <TextStyle.White>Ragnarok-style (more high levels)</>

content.title: <TextStyle.Green>Player and Dino Stats</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Yellow>Max Player Level:</> <TextStyle.White>200</>
<TextStyle.Yellow>Post-Tame Levels:</> <TextStyle.White>150</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Player Per-Level Boosts:</>
<TextStyle.White>Health: 4x | Stamina: 2.5x
Oxygen: 1000x | Weight: 10,000x
Melee: 3x | Speed: 4x
Fortitude: 100x | Crafting: 1000x</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>QoL Enabled:</>
<TextStyle.White>Speed Leveling | Flyer Speed
Unlimited Respecs | No Friendly Fire
Death Inventory Keeper | Floating Damage</>

<TextStyle.Green>Full mod details on our Discord!</>

content.title: <TextStyle.Green>New Player Starter Kit</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>When you first join, you automatically receive:</>

<TextStyle.Yellow>Survivalist Crate:</>
<TextStyle.White>- Metal Pickaxe
- Metal Hatchet
- Metal Pike
- Pteranodon Saddle</>

<TextStyle.Yellow>Dino Summon Potion:</>
<TextStyle.White>- Summons a Level 150 Pteranodon
- Pre-leveled with points in Health, Stamina, Weight, and Melee
- Your first flying mount!</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>How to use:</>
<TextStyle.White>1. Open inventory after spawning
2. Equip tools from the crate
3. Use the Dino Summon Potion
4. Saddle up your Ptera
5. Start exploring Astraeos!</>
